description_long: This is a black, octagonal frying pan with a stepped, geometric design along its sides, giving it a modern, almost industrial appearance. The pan contains a cooked food item, possibly a stir-fry, with visible pieces of meat and green vegetables. The handle is long, straight, and appears to be made of wood or a wood-like material, attached securely to the pan's body. The rim of the pan is thick and straight, with a small tab or protrusion on one side, possibly for pouring or handling. The bottom of the pan features a series of concentric, stepped ridges, enhancing grip and heat distribution. No visible brand logo or markings are present on the pan or handle.
description: A black, octagonal frying pan with a stepped, ridged design, wooden handle, and cooked food inside. The pan has a thick rim and a modern, geometric appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the octagonal, stepped body with food visible inside.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the thick rim, food contents, and the small tab or protrusion on the pan's edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the handle extending left, showing the stepped design and food inside.
description_view_3: Direct end-on view of the handle, emphasizing the pan's octagonal shape and thick rim.
attribute_handle_type: Single, straight handle made of wood, rectangular in cross-section, with a smooth finish and no visible grip texture or ergonomic shaping.
attribute_rim_design: Thick, straight rim with a geometric, octagonal profile and a small tab or protrusion for handling or pouring.
attribute_bottom_pattern: Concentric, stepped ridges forming a geometric pattern, providing texture and grip on the bottom surface.
